name: microshort-integration-tests
description: Integration tests for the microshort stack

scripts.test:e2e: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d --build --wait && npm test
scripts.test:e2e:rate: docker compose -f compose.yml -f compose.test.override.yml down -v && docker compose -f compose.yml -f compose.test.override.yml up -d --build --wait && npm run test:rate
